spec_match.rationale: Concept exercises the relevant API surface (text-decoration-skip-ink) with runtime script (~1734 chars) wired to live controls, in line with the feature summary.

interactive.rationale: Real interactive surface — 0 buttons, 2 inputs, 3 selects, 2 ranges — wired up via event listeners.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept lede matches the feature-index promise on key terms (clean, combine, offset, position, skip, text, underline, underlines).

edge_cases.rationale: No visible edge case / fallback / error handling — only the happy path.

references.rationale: ChromeStatus link is present but the page has no dedicated `references` section — the self-heal contract is fragile.

design_system.rationale: 4 raw hex colour(s) still in the style block. The design system requires CSS variables (`--bg-ivory`, `--text-charcoal` etc.)

openQuestions.title: Add explicit edge case coverage
openQuestions.detail: Pick one failure mode the spec or chromestatus motivation calls out (unsupported browser, denied permission, empty input, etc.) and surface it as a distinct demo state alongside the happy path.

openQuestions.title: Wrap references in a labelled `references` section
openQuestions.detail: Per CLAUDE.md rule #3, the chromestatus link is the self-heal anchor and should sit inside a clearly-labelled `references` section so the recovery script can find it reliably.

openQuestions.title: Swap raw hex colours for CSS variables
openQuestions.detail: Find the remaining hex literals in the inline `<style>` and replace each with the matching variable from `public/styles.css`. Re-check WCAG AA on any new pair you create.

openQuestions.title: Manually verify against the spec text
openQuestions.detail: Reviewer-v1-subagent based the spec_match verdict on the chromestatus summary ("Add support for the `all` value for the CSS text-decoration-skip-ink property, as specified in https://drafts.csswg.org/css-text-decor-4/#text-decoration-skip-ink-property.  The `text-decoration-skip-ink` property already supports `auto` an") because reading the full spec for every concept was out of budget. A human or follow-up agent should diff the demo's actual behaviour against https://drafts.csswg.org/css-text-decor-4/#text-decoration-skip-ink-property to catch anything chromestatus glossed over.

summary: Concept ships ~1734 chars of script across 0 button(s) and 7 other control(s). hits 3 pass / 2 partial / 1 fail across the six rubric criteria.
